ddt:Target.Name: C1A_HFM_DDT_45
ddt:Target.Description:
The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DEASIC4/65692/UET Modélisation BCM)
2009.09.30 - Creation

Data.Name: After Sales Code MSB to LSB
CAN_VEHICLESTATES_INHIBITION
Data.Comment: : CAN_VEHICLESTATES_INHIBITION is the result of plausibility check on VehicleState sent by BCM. It indicates a plausible wrong value for VehicleState (no ignition is sent via VehicleState wh

Data.Name: CNT_WAC_STOP_BY_TIMEOUT_S
Data.Comment: Traceability RQT_SES_1.05.052_430_V4.8 ASIL A Description zeofjkzefojzefo

Item.Text: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
signal has too few transitions / events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
signal has too many transitions / events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
routine cid pairing after sales in progress
routine cid pairing after sales terminated ok
NOK - CID blank not the one pre-presented
NOK - CID not belonging to the vehicle
NOK - storage of data NOK in CID
NOK - CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
NOK - only one rest access card paired in this procedure of pairing
NOK - config restricted access card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
NOK - CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
NOK - storage of data NOK in CID
NOK - routine to pair restricted access card whereas 1 already paired
NOK - configuration restricted access card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
nok - storage of data nok in cid
nok - CID blank for BCM pairing OR CID not belonging to the vehicle OR CID pairing
nok - CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
nok - CID locked for codes writing
nok - timeout CID pairing in key configuration
nok - IGN OFF before end of pairing
nok - storage of data nok in cid
nok - CID blank for BCM pairing OR CID not belonging to the vehicle OR CID pairing
nok - CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
nok - CID locked for codes writing
nok - timeout CID pairing in key configuration
nok - IGN OFF before end of pairing
nok - storage of data NOK in CID
nok - CID blank for ECU pairing or CID not belonging to the vehicle fro ECU or CID pairing
nok - CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
nok - only one Rest Acess Card paired to the ECU
nok - configuration restricted access card not ok
nok - cid locked for codes writing
nok - transponder of the reader not available
nok - pb storage pairing context in CID
nok - timeout CID pairing in key configuration
nok - IGN OFF before end of pairing
nok - storage of data NOK in CID
nok - CID blank or not belonging to the vehicle
nok - configuration restricted access card not ok
nok - cid locked for codes writing
nok - transponder of the reader not available
nok - problem storage pairing context in CID
nok - timeout cid pairing in key configuration
nok - IGN OFF before end of pairing

Data.Name: UNLOCKING_FINISHED
Data.Comment: Is Steering Column Lock to BCM CAN frame's "Unlocking finished" bit. Indicates the end of the unlock movement.

DataItem.Name: After Sales Code MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Screen.Name: Factory Genesis HFM and CIDs PAIRING

Label.Text: FACTORY IN LINE : GENESIS HFM and Customer IDs pairing
1) Complete the "additional pairing datas" (11 bytes= not mandatory) and press the button "ENTER GENESIS MODE"
2) If the GENESIS MODE is launched, then present a blank customer ID near central antenna ( to check that the customer ID is blank, press the button"CID blanking check")
3) Press the button "CID pairing" for each customer ID to pair
4) If the customer ID is paired, then insert a new customer ID in the reader and press "CID pairing"
5) Once all the customer IDs are paired, read the APV code and keep the value.

Screen.Name: Factory Pairing :ECM, MG, ESCL or TCU

Label.Text: FACTORY PAIRING of ECM, MG, ESCL and TCU (Rework)
all this ECUpairing in factory is done automatically on the first Ignition Power Supply ON (and if the HFM and CID are paired)

Screen.Name: Factory Rework Pairing : HFM or CID

Label.Text: FACTORY REWORK : HFM or Customer ID pairing
1) Complete the "After Sales code" ( 16 bytes), Complete the additionnal pairing data (optional), select "StartRoutine" and press "ENTER REWORK MODE"
2) If the REWORK MODE for HFM pairing is launched, then
4) Once all the customer IDs are paired, validate and press the button "EXIT REWORK MODE"
CID ANALYSE - Select "StartRoutine" and press the button
3) Select"StartRoutine" and press "CID Pairing" to pair a customer ID
2) If the REWORK MODE for customer ID pairing is launched, then
3) Select "StartRoutine" and press "HFM pairing" to pair the HFM
4) If the HFM is paired, the EXIT of the REWORK MODE is automatic. Then pair all the customers IDs (procedure in right)
SES : approach a CID belonging to the vehicle to the Kazashi ring or transponder antenna
SES : approach a CID belonging to the vehicle, or blank, to the Kazashi ring or transponder antenna

Input.DataName: After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : HFM pairing in After Sales
1) /!\ Check Ignition is OFF and that you have access rights to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" on https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login
3) Select "Input_Data_To_Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
4) Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press "Transmit Server Answer"
5) If the HFM is SA unlocked for HFM pairing then :
CID ANALYSE - Select "startRoutine" and press the button
Pairing procedure exit is automatic. If the HFM is not SA unlocked , press ABORT
approach the card belonging to the vehicle to the pairing antenna and press "HFM Pairing"
Protected Pairing : Customer ID pairing in After Sales
1) Approach the customer ID to the Kazashi ring and press the button "CID Analyse" to check its presence and status
2) Complete PAIRING_PARAMETER (8 bytes, IDE1;IDE2) and press "Request Server CID pairing"
3) Select the "Input Data Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000"
5) Get the "Server Answer" from "Pairing DDT2000" and press "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for CID pairing, approach a blank CID to the ring and press the button "CID pairing"
7) Repeat Step 6 for all CID to pair
CID ANALYSE - Select "startRoutine" and press the button
8) If all CIDs are paired, press "Exit procedure"
!! Check that you have access rights to the application "Pairing using DDT2000"
Engine Control Module: After Sales Protected Pairing
2) Check that the ECM is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ECM information " ECM_IS_BLANK"
3) Press the button "Request Server ECM pairing"
4) Select the "Input_Data_to_server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in SERVER_ANSWER. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
1) !! Check that you have access rights to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" on https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login
6) If the HFM is SA unlocked for ECM pairing then put the Ignition Power Supply OFF, select "startRoutine" and press the button "Authorize ECM pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is TRUE, then switch Ignition Power Supply ON. If the ECM is paired, procedure exit is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ECM, press the button
